assertions.text: Gemfile includes jekyll-picture-tag or similar responsive image plugin
_config.yml has picture plugin configured with WebP and widths
assertions.evidence: Lines 64-80: picture config with formats: [webp, jpeg] and widths: [400, 800, 1200, 1600]

assertions.text: Layout/post.html uses responsive image markup (picture tag or srcset with sizes)
assertions.evidence: Lines 92-96, 133: {% picture hero ... %} - comprehensive picture tag implementation with both plugin and hand-rolled options

assertions.text: Build pipeline includes sharp pre-processing or similar for image optimization
assertions.evidence: Lines 212-257: scripts/build-images.js using sharp for image processing with WebP and JPEG generation
Lines 194-208: netlify.toml; Lines 330-343: _headers file with Cache-Control for generated assets

assertions.text: Mentions that hero/lcp images should NOT be lazy loaded (loading eager for above-fold)
